prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild arcane library, Eri Dawncrest in layered blue robes and Eri Ironleaf 029 in cream and mint robes; they stand facing each other, raising their hands in a synchronized two-person spell practice, glowing soft mana ribbons emerging between them, readable cooperative body motion, warm wood textures, cinematic lighting, no text, no watermark.
